source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
2 cups uncooked short grain rice standard measuring cup not the cup that comes with a rice cooker 
	1 tbsps sesame oil
	salt to taste start with 1/2 tsp
ingredients.original:
2 cups uncooked short grain rice standard measuring cup not the cup that comes with a rice cooker 
	1 tbsps sesame oil
	salt to taste start with 1/2 tsp

ingredients.item:
10 ounces firm tofu
	1 bunch spinach about 8 ounces
	1 tsp sesame oil
	3 kirby cucumbers
	2 medium carrots
	1 burdock root uoeong, braised 
	sesame oil
	salt
	cooking oil
